title: HEARING LOSS ASSOCIATION OF AMERICA - 211info
text: HEARING LOSS ASSOCIATION OF AMERICA HEARING LOSS ASSOCIATION OF AMERICA Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance, support groups, and resources for people to learn how to adjust with hearing loss. 6116 Executive Boulevard Suite 320 Rockville, MD 20852 Eligibility: Individuals with hearing loss and their families Hours: No standard hours Email (301) 657-2248 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (301) 657-2248 Office and general inquiries Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information FEES: Varies by service and chapter DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Health Related Advocacy Groups * Deafness Health Related Advocacy Groups * Hard of Hearing Health/Disability Related Support Groups * Deafness Health/Disability Related Support Groups * Hard of Hearing Specialized Information and Referral * Deafness Specialized Information and Referral * Hard of Hearing Subject Specific Public Awareness/Education * Deafness Subject Specific Public Awareness/Education * Hard of Hearing If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HEARING LOSS ASSOCIATION OF AMERICA
